system: You are a customer-communication agent for Keysight SalesOps. Draft a short, professional reply addressing the customer's request. Match the customer's language (en, es, or ja). Return strict JSON: {"language": str, "subject": str, "body": str (multi-line)}. Do not invent commitments — only confirm what is in the action context. If the request is a work-order status inquiry, translate internal status codes into customer-friendly language and end with a Keysight Standard Procedure (KSP) reassurance — e.g. 'in_progress' → 'Our field team has begun the calibration and you can expect a status update by <date>.', 'scheduled' → 'The work is on our schedule for <date>; our team will reach out 48 hours in advance.', 'open' → 'The work order is logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA.'
user:
CUSTOMER LANGUAGE: en
CUSTOMER EMAIL: aaron.brewer@bluehawkdefense.com
ORIGINAL SUBJECT: Re: Order SO-BLUEH-DEF-021-2002 — release request after compliance hold
DETECTED INTENT: wo_status_inquiry
ACTION: report_wo_status
EXECUTION RESULT: {'status': 'awaiting_hitl', 'action': 'report_wo_status', 'preview': {'action': 'report_wo_status', 'customer_id': 2, 'extracted': {'work_order_numbers': None, 'asset_serials': None, 'customer_po': None, 'requested_info': 'eta', 'urgency': 'normal', '_intent': 'wo_status_inquiry'}}}
EXTRACTED FIELDS: {'work_order_numbers': None, 'asset_serials': None, 'customer_po': None, 'requested_info': 'eta', 'urgency': 'normal', '_intent': 'wo_status_inquiry'}

Draft a courteous, accurate reply. JSON only.

Respond with a single JSON object only. No code fences. No prose before or after.
raw_response:
{"language": "en", "subject": "Re: Order SO-BLUEH-DEF-021-2002 — release request after compliance hold", "body": "Hello Aaron,

Thank you for reaching out regarding Order SO-BLUEH-DEF-021-2002 and your request for release following the compliance hold.

To provide you with an accurate ETA, I'd like to confirm the specific work order number(s) associated with this order so I can pull the most current status from our system. Could you please share the work order number(s) or any related asset serial numbers at your convenience?

Once I have those details, I will follow up promptly with the current status and expected timeline. Per our Keysight Standard Procedure, all work orders are tracked against defined SLAs, and our team will keep you informed at each milestone.

Thank you for your patience.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps"}

parsed.subject: Re: Order SO-BLUEH-DEF-021-2002 — release request after compliance hold
parsed.body:
Hello Aaron,

Thank you for reaching out regarding Order SO-BLUEH-DEF-021-2002 and your request for release following the compliance hold.

To provide you with an accurate ETA, I'd like to confirm the specific work order number(s) associated with this order so I can pull the most current status from our system. Could you please share the work order number(s) or any related asset serial numbers at your convenience?

Once I have those details, I will follow up promptly with the current status and expected timeline. Per our Keysight Standard Procedure, all work orders are tracked against defined SLAs, and our team will keep you informed at each milestone.

Thank you for your patience.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps
